lines.text: Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Fort Wilderness Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground
LocatedinWalt Disney World® Resort
Relax on a horse-drawn carriage ride along the scenic trails around The Cabins and Campsites of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.
All Ages
$65 (tax not included)
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Operating Hours –
View All Times
Check Available Days
Your Carriage Awaits
Enjoy the beauty of nature as you travel in style around Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground.
Schedule & Pricing

You’ll board your horse-drawn carriage for a 25-minute ride near Crockett’s Tavern. If arriving by vehicle, please park in the main entrance of Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground and take a bus to the Settlement Depot. Carriages fit up to 4 adults, or 2 adults and 3 small children.
Each horse-drawn carriage ride costs $65.
How to Book
Advance reservations are highly recommended, as availability is limited.

Reservations can be made on this page or with the My Disney Experience app up to 60 days prior to your visit. Same-day reservations and walk-ins can be made on a limited basis and are subject to availability.
Know Before You Go
This experience may be cancelled due to inclement weather but will occur in rain and cold. Umbrellas, ponchos and sunscreen are not provided.
Guests using a wheelchair must be able to step up into the carriage.
Rides accommodate 4 adults or 2 adults and 3 children only.
There is a 1-day cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if a Guest cancels within one day or no-shows for the reservation.
Please check in across from the main entrance to Crockett’s Tavern near Pioneer Hall at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground 15 minutes prior to your reservation.
If arriving by your own vehicle, please park in the main entrance of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort and Campground and take a complimentary bus ride to the Settlement Depot.
Allow up to 1.5 hours to get to your destination when traveling within Walt Disney World Resort.
